ARGUED. After full arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Respondents/Defendants San Francisco Planning Commission and City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to Petitioner/Plaintiff Michael Turon's petition for writ of mandate and first amended complaint for injunctive and declaratory relief.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
